ddls:
CREATE TABLE "assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset */,
  "asset_description" TEXT /* Description of the asset */,
  "commission_year" INTEGER /* Year the asset was commissioned */,
  "more_than_10_years" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the asset is more than 10 years old */,
  "purchase_cost" REAL /* Cost of purchasing the asset */,
  "price_more_10k" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the purchase cost is more than 10,000 */,
  "asset_status" TEXT /* Current status of the asset (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "expected_lifespan_years" INTEGER /* Expected lifespan of the asset in years */,
  "asset_age_years" REAL /* Current age of the asset in years */,
  "warranty_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the warranty in months */,
  "past_expected" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the asset has passed its expected lifespan */,
  "purchase_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the purchase category of the asset */,
  "purchase_status" INTEGER /* Flag indicating the purchase status (e.g., 1 for purchased, 0 for not purchased) */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the asset was purchased */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturer of the asset */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the asset */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the asset */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the current location of the asset */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the asset was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance performed */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "depreciation_rate" REAL /* Annual depreciation rate of the asset */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current estimated value of the asset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assets_asset_status FOREIGN KEY ("asset_status") REFERENCES asset_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assets_purchase_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("purchase_category_id") REFERENCES purchase_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assets_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assets_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchase_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the purchase category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the purchase category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the asset status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the asset status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset being maintained */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., Preventive, Corrective) */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance was performed */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance */,
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technician who performed the maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_due" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance after the current record */,
  "parts_replaced" TEXT /* List of parts replaced during the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the maintenance (e.g., Successful, Pending, Failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_technician_id FOREIGN KEY ("technician_id") REFERENCES technicians ("technician_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_next_maintenance_due FOREIGN KEY ("next_maintenance_due") REFERENCES maintenance_records ("maintenance_date"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technicians" (
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technician */,
  "technician_name" TEXT /* Full name of the technician */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the technician */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the technician */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the technician */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the technician belongs to */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* List of certifications the technician holds */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("technician_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technicians_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warranty_claims" (
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warranty claim */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset for which the claim is made */,
  "claim_date" TEXT /* Date the claim was filed */,
  "claim_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the warranty claim */,
  "claim_status" TEXT /* Status of the claim (e.g., Open, Closed) */,
  "claim_amount" REAL /* Amount claimed */,
  "claim_resolution_date" TEXT /* Date the claim was resolved */,
  "claim_number" TEXT /* Unique claim number provided by the manufacturer */,
  "service_center_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the service center where the claim was processed */,
  "service_center_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the service center regarding the claim */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warranty_claims_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warranty_claims_service_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_center_id") REFERENCES service_centers ("service_center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial record */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset related to the financial record */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date of the financial record */,
  "record_type" TEXT /* Type of financial record (e.g., Purchase, Maintenance, Depreciation) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount recorded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial record */,
  "financial_year" INTEGER /* Financial year of the record */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding (e.g., Hospital Budget, Grant) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_records_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Administrator, Maintenance Staff, Financial Officer) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the asset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., View, Edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "department_assets" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset assigned */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department to which the asset is assigned */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the asset was assigned to the department */,
  "unassignment_date" TEXT /* Date the asset was unassigned from the department */,
  "current_user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user currently responsible for the asset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_department_assets_current_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("current_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_department_assets_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_department_assets_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "head_of_department" TEXT /* Name of the head of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the department */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_website" TEXT /* Website of the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_centers" (
  "service_center_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service center */,
  "service_center_name" TEXT /* Name of the service center */,
  "service_center_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the service center */,
  "service_center_website" TEXT /* Website of the service center */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_center_id")
)
